newsSinceJun6: No material company-specific news since June 6. Nearest items predate the window: a June 4 free design/validation data-provision service for 8th-gen IGBT power-conversion prototypes (minor), and earlier 2026 items (MEPPI 800 VDC AI-factory infrastructure support, Feb 6 JMoD defense satcom contract, Mar 4 Lockheed Martin satcom MOU). June 9 'Mitsubishi' headlines are Mitsubishi Motors (Eclipse Sportback EV), a different company. Today's +2.66% looks sector/flow-driven, not fundamental.

sources.label: Businesswire - Mitsubishi Electric power-semiconductor data-provision service (Jun 4, 2026)
MEPPI - 800 VDC infrastructure for AI factories
Mitsubishi Electric global news index (checked for post-Jun-6 releases)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold at 35: no new bottleneck-relevant evidence since June 6, and the stock has quietly rerated (YTD 18.3% -> 21.5%, +2.7% today on no news), which trims residual alpha on a passives-alpha lens without justifying a rank cut for a name already bucketed 'secondary' and discounted for being farther from the passive/power bottleneck stack.
verdicts.bull: Power semis (8th-gen IGBT/SiC), MEPPI 800 VDC AI-factory infrastructure, and grid/defense electronics give multi-leg exposure to the AI power buildout, with the IGBT data-provision service lowering customer adoption friction.
verdicts.neutral: Diversified conglomerate where AI-power exposure is a minority of revenue; +21.5% YTD is in line with Japanese heavy-electric peers, so the setup is neither stretched nor newly asymmetric.
verdicts.bear: Newsless drift higher into a crowded Japan AI-power trade compresses the alpha case; the name sits farther from the true passive/power bottleneck stack, so it rerates with the theme but lacks a stock-specific catalyst.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Concrete AI/data-center order or capacity announcement in power devices or 800 VDC infrastructure (e.g., hyperscaler or AI-factory design win) quantifying the segment.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued thematic rerating without fundamental confirmation, leaving the position exposed to a Japan heavy-electrics/AI-power unwind.
